prompt: Range bucket is weak and pressure is growing. Choose action.
why_v1: Fold keeps a weak bucket from paying into pressure without a clear reason to continue.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Fold fits this weak bucket because pressure is rising while the likely hand group has little reason to continue.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Fold fits this weak bucket because calling pressure without a stronger reason turns a thin hope into a bigger problem.
